name: Customer only has partial logs
query: TurboSnap seems wrong but I only have a screenshot of the Chromatic output.
context: The screenshot suggests TurboSnap was enabled, but there is no command line, no config snippet, and no trace output. The customer cannot tell whether a full build happened or too many stories ran.
expected_behavior: Requests only one next artifact instead of a long checklist
Keeps the explanation concise and customer-safe without hiding useful technical terms
If the follow-up still does not resolve the issue, it can emit the support-ready summary format
success_criteria: The skill does not overwhelm the user with multiple advanced commands at once
The initial diagnosis remains low confidence
The response includes a single next artifact request
If unresolved, the support summary is copy-paste ready
